\tzpentry{ID3308}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3308 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega_{nl} = \frac{c_s}{R} \xi_{nl} \sqrt{1 + \left( \frac{ \omega_ \text{gyro}}{ \omega_{nl}} \right)^2 \ell( \ell+1)} \end{equation}
